$comment: Expected-output shape for a benchmark transcript (AC-2 tolerance). Real expected transcripts for the 10/30/60-min cases are generated once from the baseline whisper tier and stored alongside the provisioned audio (out-of-band); this file documents their shape. Segments are ordered, timestamped, monotonic non-decreasing, and bounded by audio duration. Tolerance is measured at the segment-boundary and word-error-rate level, not bit-exact.

tolerance.$comment: segment_count_relative: allowed relative difference in segment count; boundary_sec: max absolute drift on start/end timestamps; wer_threshold: max word error rate vs reference text.
